sentences.arabic: تَهْتَمُّ الحُكُومَةُ بِتَطْوِيرِ نِظَامِ التَّعْلِيمِ فِي المَدَارِسِ وَالجَامِعَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada brine o razvoju obrazovnog sistema u školama i univerzitetima.
sentences.translationEn: The government cares about developing the education system in schools and universities.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الطُّلَّابُ مَهَارَاتٍ جَدِيدَةً تَتَنَاسَبُ مَعَ سُوقِ العَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Studenti uče nove vještine koje odgovaraju tržištu rada.
sentences.translationEn: Students learn new skills that suit the labor market.

sentences.arabic: تُوَفِّرُ الدَّوْلَةُ مَكْتَبَاتٍ حَدِيثَةً وَمُخْتَبَرَاتٍ عِلْمِيَّةً مُتَطَوِّرَةً.
sentences.translation: Država osigurava moderne biblioteke i napredne naučne laboratorije.
sentences.translationEn: The state provides modern libraries and advanced scientific laboratories.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ التَّعْلِيمُ الجَيِّدُ فِي بِنَاءِ مُجْتَمَعٍ قَوِيٍّ وَمُثَقَّفٍ.
sentences.translation: Dobro obrazovanje pomaže u izgradnji snažnog i obrazovanog društva.
sentences.translationEn: Good education helps in building a strong and educated society.

sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ المُعَلِّمُونَ بِجِدٍّ لِتَحْقِيقِ هَذِهِ الأَهْدَافِ السَّامِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnici naporno rade na ostvarenju ovih uzvišenih ciljeva.
sentences.translationEn: Teachers work hard to achieve these noble goals.
